title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 4: Second cDNA Strand Synthesis
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol is part 4 of a 10 part series
steps.instruction: This protocol is part 4 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA second strand synthesis

steps.title: Temperature module cools down to 4...
steps.instruction: Temperature module cools down to 4 C (this can be done manually prior to protocol start)

steps.title: 8 uL of reaction buffer is...
steps.instruction: 8 uL of reaction buffer is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 1 to all samples

steps.title: 4 uL of enzyme mix is...
steps.instruction: 4 uL of enzyme mix is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 3 to all samples then mixed to combine

steps.title: 48 ul of nuclease free water...
steps.instruction: 48 ul of nuclease free water is added to each sample from slot 4, column 12 then mixed

steps.title: Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
steps.instruction: Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
